response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong technical leadership, including roles at Google and Meta, which align well with the role's requirements. His experience with developer tools (DLang, CI/CD, testing frameworks) and mobile platform work (Apple TV/iOS apps) are highly relevant. However, his people management experience is less clearly documented, and his current role is pure IC, requiring further evaluation of leadership fit.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools, testing, and build systems (DLang, CI/CD, MCP)
Proven track record in mobile-platform development (Apple TV/iOS) and scalable systems
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship (organizing workshops, teaching TDD)
concerns: Limited explicit people management experience in recent roles (current role is Staff IC at Google)
Mobile-platform experience is present but not centered on build systems/testing infrastructure
No direct experience leading organizational change or managing large teams
